meaning: n.巴布亚岛(位于太平洋上澳大利亚的北面)
examples: Papua New Guinea became independent from Australia in 1975.
Papua New Guinea is the largest one of the Pacific Island countries.
If his luck doesn't change, he will cheerfully change his plan, and aim to land at Papua New Guinea.
The route to Vanimo, a coastal city in northwestern Papua New Guinea, is not as direct.
Papua New Guinea is predominantly Christian, but many communities combine their faith with tribal traditions.
